branch_metadata.branch_rationale: Internal structural / framework-internal diagnostic; branch-blind algebraic or seed-level test

anchor_II_lemma9.admissibility: a=1 in allowed set {1/4, 1/2, 1, 2, 1/N_gen, 1/(2*N_gen)} per loop_class_library.json forbidden_classes; unfilled by existing Lemmas 1-8.

structural_ansaetze: (A1) Lambda_t = alpha_xi^2 = 81/100 (P4 sec:gap; per-regime ratio 0.974-1.017 on 12 N-points)

(A2) c = 2*gamma*Lambda_t (twice damping rate x cosmological-tensor time-time diagonal); algebraically equal to 2*alpha_xi^2*gamma. The alternative factorisation c = alpha_xi*shear (where shear=2*alpha_xi*gamma from C1^2 unit-budget closure) is empirically falsified at Delta-AICc=+86 on the 12-point ladder.
(A3) Lemma-9 sub-leading class: d/c = -(1+gamma); topology coefficient a=1 admissible-but-unfilled in the loop_class_library forbidden-classes parameter-free set.

interpretation: PRECISE-tier closure conditional on three pre-registered structural anchors (A1)-(A3); not first-principles. The integrated cross-anchor theorem chain has not been derived. The chain falsifies if any anchor fails empirical-validation.
